title: Trees, Traversals, and Binary Search Trees
description: Index hierarchical records and ordered keys with explicit structural invariants. Learners cumulatively produce a traversable search tree with validity checks through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish root, edge, parent, child, ancestor, depth, height, leaf, and subtree.
Implement preorder, inorder, postorder, and level-order traversal iteratively and recursively.
Preserve a documented duplicate policy and global ordering invariant during updates.
